steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The table gives $h(0) = 17$, $h(1) = 18$, $h(2) = 20$. Every choice has the form $h(x) = 2^x + c$. At $x = 0$, $2^0 = 1$, so $h(0) = 1 + c$. Matching $h(0) = 17$ requires $c = 16$.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$h(x) = 2^x + 16$': $h(0) = 1 + 16 = 17$ ✓
  • Choice B — '$h(x) = 2^x + 15$': $h(0) = 1 + 15 = 16 eq 17$ ✗
  • Choice C — '$h(x) = 2^x + 2$': $h(0) = 1 + 2 = 3 eq 17$ ✗
  • Choice D — '$h(x) = 2^x$': $h(0) = 1 eq 17$ ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
